high_level_description: A young tribal person stands in a lush tropical forest, facing a swirling barrier of dark energy.

style_description.lighting: dramatic side light from the barrier, with soft diffused light from canopy above

compositional_deconstruction.background: Dense tropical rainforest with tall trees, hanging vines, large green leaves, and dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy.

elements.desc: A young tribal person with dark skin, wearing traditional attire made of leaves and animal skins, adorned with beads and a feather headdress; face painted with white and red patterns; eyes wide with awe and fear; hand raised defensively.
Dark energy barrier: a swirling, semi-transparent wall of purple-black energy with tendrils of violet and deep blue; faintly glowing with a malevolent aura; distorting the background behind it.
Canopy of tropical trees with large dark green leaves and patches of bright sky visible; a few beams of sunlight cutting through.
Thick tropical undergrowth with ferns, large monstera leaves, and twisting vines; some leaves have a subtle purple glow from the energy barrier.
A large ancient tree trunk with rough bark, moss, and a few glowing mushrooms at its base.
